description: Frozen evaluation substrate for all research-backlog experiments. Mirrors DEFAULT_STRICT_SEARCH_ORIGINS in recession_engine/backtester.py:90 as of git SHA ed24542. Every experiment must evaluate on this exact set to keep keep/discard verdicts comparable across iterations.

evaluation_scope_policy.policy: 1990-present is the PRIMARY evaluation window. Pre-1990 origins (Oil Crisis, Volcker I, Volcker II, 1978/1986 expansion checks) are retained as INFORMATIONAL — they report in all validation JSONs but do NOT drive KEEP/DISCARD verdicts. Training still uses full history (evaluation-only scope, not training-scope).
evaluation_scope_policy.rationale: Recurring pattern across A1/A1.75/B2/B2.5: modern-era optimization destabilizes pre-1990 detection. Pre-1990 macro regime (Volcker disinflation, 40% goods-producing employment share, pre-financial-innovation) is materially different from the regime the dashboard actually forecasts in. Optimizing for 1981 is museum work.
evaluation_scope_policy.gate_thresholds_adjustment: Smaller in-scope sample (~45 positive months vs full ~85) widens small-sample variance. Future experiments may widen CV-PR-AUC improvement gate slightly (e.g., 1.5pp instead of 2pp) — document per-experiment.

baseline_artifacts_note: Pinned baseline pickles restored from git SHA ed24542 on 2026-04-22 so future validators can compare challenger-on-current-data vs baseline-on-current-data without retraining drift contaminating the comparison.

baseline_metrics_at_freeze.source: data/models/metrics.csv + backtest_summary.txt + alfred_vintage_summary.txt + confidence_intervals.json at git SHA ed24542
baseline_metrics_at_freeze.metrics_scope_note: Baseline metrics above are computed on full-history origins (pre-adoption of 1990-present scope policy). Future experiment validation JSONs should report per-scope metrics: full-history (for backward compat) AND in_scope-only (for gate decisions).

notes: Plan originally said 13 origins; actual count in backtester is 15 (7 positive + 8 expansion).
ECE + calibration slope/intercept are unmeasured at freeze; they become new metrics after A1 ships.
Oil Crisis (1972-11 training cutoff) currently fails with single-class error; keep in set as negative diagnostic.
2026-04-23: evaluation_scope policy added. Pre-1990 origins become informational; post-1990 drives gate decisions. Training window unchanged (full history).
